properties.name: grails.views.json.mimeTypes
properties.description: MIME types handled by JSON views.

properties.name: grails.views.json.generator.escapeUnicode
properties.description: Whether to escape Unicode characters in JSON output.

properties.name: grails.views.json.generator.dateFormat
properties.description: The date format pattern for JSON serialization.

properties.name: grails.views.json.generator.timeZone
properties.description: The time zone for JSON date serialization.

properties.name: grails.views.json.generator.locale
properties.description: The locale for JSON output formatting.

properties.name: grails.views.json.compileStatic
properties.description: Whether JSON views are statically compiled.

properties.name: grails.views.json.encoding
properties.description: The character encoding for JSON views.

properties.name: grails.views.json.prettyPrint
properties.description: Whether to pretty-print JSON output with indentation.

properties.name: grails.views.json.allowResourceExpansion
properties.description: Whether to allow HAL resource expansion in JSON views.
